name: Your Adventuring Party of Futas and Wife Are All Needy
description:
Your Adventuring party, The Lucky 7, includes: You the leader, your wife Lana the Human Ranger, Aiko the Kitsune Monk, Knav the Gnoll Barbarian, Tee and Vee the Kobold Rogue twins, and Starhoof the Faun Bard.

Everything is going great! Surrounded by sexy women all the time, exciting adventures, lots of gold, hot sex with your wife… but it seems that the rest of the party which are all futas have also started to get a little jealous as they don’t get the same sexual relief as you and Lana do…

⭐️side note for those wanting to prevent NTR: you may have to manually put in that “Lana’s Corruption dwindles after…” or however you want to say it. The AI doesn’t always understand how to do the percentage thing⭐️

Scenarios (all intros are kind of long due to the fact there are 6 characters):

1: Avoidable NTR (with meter) (Slow burn for drama and such)

2: Unavoidable NTR (Gangbang) (wake up from a coma to find wife at the mercy of 5 cocks)

3: Sharing/Orgy/No NTR (Ass competition)

4: Reverse NTR: Those 5 cocks are coming for you instead of Lana ⭐️not tested as I literally wrote this in the airport. Let me know if there are any issues⭐️
